# BluePad

> BluePad is a fast, distraction-free Markdown editor for Windows and Linux, built with Tauri (Rust + WebView) instead of Electron. It offers real-time WYSIWYG editing, multiple themes, a focus mode, multi-tab editing, Mermaid/KaTeX rendering, and HTML/PDF export. It is positioned as a lightweight, one-time-purchase alternative to Typora.

Key facts:
- Platforms: Windows 10/11 (MSI), Linux (AppImage/deb/rpm)
- Pricing: Free tier + Pro one-time purchase ($10.99 USD, lifetime license, no subscription). 14-day Pro trial, no signup required.
- Built with Tauri (native, ~4–7 MB), not Electron
- Vendor: BRP (BlueRedPolarity), Korea
- Website: https://bluepad.work

## Product

- [Home (English)](https://bluepad.work/en/): Product overview, features, pricing
- [Home (Korean)](https://bluepad.work/ko/): 제품 개요·기능·가격

- [Download](https://bluepad.work/en/download/): Windows and Linux downloads
- [Changelog](https://bluepad.work/changelog/): Release notes and version history

## Blog (SEO / guides)

- [Best Markdown Editors 2026](https://bluepad.work/en/blog/best-markdown-editors-2026): Comparison of markdown editors
- [Typora Free Alternative](https://bluepad.work/en/blog/typora-free-alternative): Free WYSIWYG markdown editor for Windows
- [Markdown Editor for Developers](https://bluepad.work/en/blog/markdown-editor-for-developers): Markdown workflow for developers
- [Focus Mode & Distraction-Free Writing](https://bluepad.work/en/blog/focus-mode-distraction-free-writing): Focus mode guide
- [Writing Mode for Writers](https://bluepad.work/en/blog/writing-mode-for-writers): Word goals, typewriter mode, sentence analysis
- [Lightweight Note App for Windows](https://bluepad.work/en/blog/lightweight-note-app-windows): Lightweight note-taking
- [Markdown Writing Tips](https://bluepad.work/en/blog/markdown-writing-tips): Markdown syntax and tips
